reconciliation.P3_Pothos: Systemic Loss (Rabbit anchor present, plant absent)

vision_report.inventory_reconciliation: The registry is entirely invalidated. All biological specimens previously associated with the pots have undergone total senescence or removal. The desk surface now contains only inert objects (pots, rabbit figurine, electronic component).

plant_audit.P1_Yellow_Pot: Empty. Soil appears dry and devoid of organic matter.
plant_audit.P3_Black_Pot: Empty. Rabbit figurine remains, but the Pothos specimen is absent.
plant_audit.P4_Shared_Black_Pot: Empty. No evidence of Silver Guest.

biome_observations.debris: Presence of crushed eggshells in P2/P4 area. An electronic component (likely a header pin or connector) is present on the desk surface near the pots.

temporal_deltas.earliest_to_t4: Initial state shows a single leaf remnant in the black pot.
temporal_deltas.t4_to_t2: Progressive loss of leaf structure; the specimen in the black pot undergoes rapid chlorosis and collapse.
temporal_deltas.t1_to_current: Total disappearance of all plant matter. The biome has transitioned from a state of decline to a state of complete biological vacancy.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The specimens have suffered a terminal decline. There is zero evidence of living plant tissue. The environment is currently non-functional for botanical life.
anomalies: Introduction of an electronic component (header pin) on the desk surface.
Persistent presence of crushed eggshells, likely used as a failed soil amendment.
Total absence of the Pothos plant despite the presence of the scale anchor (rabbit).
vision_report.narrative_description: The audit confirms a catastrophic failure of the indoor botanical biome. Over the observed five-day period, the specimens exhibited rapid decline, culminating in the total loss of all plant life. The current state is characterized by empty, dry pots and the presence of non-biological debris. The environment is no longer supporting the registered species.
